task_description: Implement Schedule Release for Execution feature: database model, migration, repository, schemas, service with background scheduler task, REST API endpoints, UI routes, and templates. Allows users to schedule a release for future execution, with automatic dispatch at the scheduled time.

verification.summary: All 252 tests pass (237 existing + 15 new scheduler tests). Build via uv sync successful. Docker build skipped (no running Docker daemon). Test quality verified: tests exercise real service logic, validation paths, background task processing, and API endpoints.
